rule.name: At this moment there are $(values_count) registry values monitored and the limit is $(registry_limit).
rule.description: At this moment there are $(values_count) registry values monitored and the limit is $(registry_limit).
rule.query:
<if_sid>230</if_sid>
    <field name="alert_type">normal</field>
    <field name="fim_db_table">registry_data</field>
    <description>At this moment there are $(values_count) registry values monitored and the limit is $(registry_limit).</description>
    <group>syscheck,fim_db_state,</group>
